completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for knowledge stats empty-store 500. No source or parent certification fields modified.

Root-cause fix implemented in internal/knowledge/store.go: outer COALESCE handles an empty knowledge_concepts scalar subquery as an explicit empty prompt_contract_version, and lint stats only tolerate pgx.ErrNoRows. Added tests/integration/knowledge_stats_test.go adversarial empty-store regression and updated tests/e2e/knowledge_store_test.go to assert the empty-store HTTP 200 + zero/default stats contract. Targeted Go unit and focused E2E pass; new integration regression passes inside a broader integration run that still exits 1 due to unrelated NATS/Drive failures. Broad E2E exited 1 on a Docker host-port conflict for 127.0.0.1:45002 before producing a passing suite result; certification remains in_progress.

scopeProgress.name: Return valid stats for an empty knowledge store

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered knowledge stats blocker. No prior bug folder existed under specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer.

failures.summary: Knowledge stats returns 500 on empty store.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: Single bug scope; owner starts with targeted red-stage proof before edits.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: bubbles.validate certification after targeted and broader E2E evidence.
